title: Amtech - 5 Litre Hex Paint Mixer for Paint, Grout, and Most Adhesives, Fits Electric Drills with 10mm Shank, Reduces Strain and Fatigue, Easy to Clean, Durable and Long Lasting
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: EFFICIENT: The Amtech S3952 Hex Paint Mixer ensures thorough and efficient mixing of paint, grout, and adhesives.
UNIVERSAL FIT: Designed with a hexagonal shaft that fits most electrical drills, providing compatibility and ease of use.
DURABLE: Crafted for durability, this mixer is built to withstand rigorous mixing tasks and is easy to clean after use.
GUARANTEED: Backed by a 3-year guarantee for added peace of mind.
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description The mixer withstands rigorous mixing tasks for long lasting use that you can rely on. Perfect for both professionals and DIYers. The mixer reduces strain and fatigue for the user during prolonged mixing so that you can spend more time on DIY. It’s also easy to clean for hassle-free cleanup. The hexagonal shaft fits most electrical drills that accept a 10mm shank, and is ideal for mixing paint, grout, and most adhesives.
